name: New Year's Eve Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour once and combine it with baking powder and salt, then sift together a total of three times.
2. Cream the butter thoroughly, gradually adding sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Alternately add small amounts of flour and milk, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Stir in the vanilla flavoring.
5. Gently fold in the egg whites until fully incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into three greased 9-inch layer pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375 degrees F) for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Spread Chocolate Cream Filling between layers and apply Hungarian Chocolate Frosting on top and sides of the cake.
9. Once the frosting is set, write numbers from one to twelve around the top of the cake with white frosting to represent the face of a clock. Set the hands at twelve o'clock.
